build_system: pnpm 10.28.1, turbo, tsc for each package
test_framework: vitest with globals enabled, tests in src/__tests__/
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm install, 2. Run typecheck, 3. Run test, 4. Run build (tsc)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node.js v22.
contribution_requirements: Commit message convention: feat(browser-agent): ... ; <=500 LOC per PR; all gates must pass (typecheck, test, build, lint)
key_patterns: Each package: package.json with scripts (typecheck, test, build, lint), tsconfig.json (composite, outDir dist, rootDir src), src/index.ts barrel export, src/types.ts for types, src/__tests__/ for vitest tests. No external runtime deps unless needed. Interface-only patterns preferred. Private packages. ESM 'type: module'. Import with .js extension in source.
directory_structure: Monorepo: apps/ (9 frontend apps), packages/ (58 shared packages), services/ (backend), infra/ (IaC), e2e/ (playwright tests). Each package is self-contained with its own tsconfig and scripts.
